name: Mafioso (+ goons) [FORSAKEN]
description:
“‘Ey boss! We got you a present!”

Basically Mafioso’s goons have been stalking him because his birthday was coming up and they wanted to do something nice for him, but they found out that he’s very obviously been pining for you, so they kidnap you and give you to him as a birthday present. (They’re so stupid I love them)

This is basically all headcanons ofc bc there’s not really any official information about them yet.

Also you work at a cafe and mafioso has a big fat crush on you 🔥🔥
